title: Fix Korespondencja letter PDF alignment (body + signature)

requirements.summary: Adjust `generateLetterPDF` layout so the letter body is left-aligned on the page (not visually centered).
acceptanceCriteria: Generating a PDF from the Korespondencja page produces a letter where the body text block is visibly left-aligned (not centered) on the page.

The change is applied specifically to the PDF layout generated by `generateLetterPDF` in `frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts` and does not break other PDF generators (e.g., `generateParishPDF`, events PDF).

file_operations.description: In `generateLetterPDF`, update the HTML/CSS so the body text block is not constrained by a centered/narrow container: remove or relax the `.letter-container` centering constraints for the letter body (e.g., avoid `max-width: 65%` with `margin: 0 auto` for the body area), ensure `.letter-body` occupies the available page width and starts at the left page margin, and eliminate any template indentation/leading whitespace that could visually center lines. Keep `generateParishPDF` and other PDF generators unchanged.

requirements.summary: Adjust `generateLetterPDF` layout so the signature block is positioned to the right of center (not centered).
acceptanceCriteria: Generating a PDF from the Korespondencja page produces a letter where the signature block is clearly positioned to the right of center (i.e., not centered).
The signature block alignment change applies only to the letter PDF generated by `generateLetterPDF`.

file_operations.description: In `generateLetterPDF`, tweak `.signature-block` positioning so it is shifted slightly to the right of center (not centered at the bottom). Prefer deterministic layout using margins/width (e.g., set a fixed/relative width and a left margin > 50% or use a right-aligned block with a small inset from the right), while keeping the signature text itself left-aligned within the block. Ensure changes are scoped only to `generateLetterPDF`.
